participants.bio: Joined IIH-COH11-170925. No profile bio submitted yet.

events.description: Being able to take a break when I need to.

It is great that you are able to prioritise your self-care, taking breaks when you need them. I like to have a stretch and a drink when I take a break, though sometimes it's simply resting. How do you like to take a break?
Go for a short walk outside on Saturday morning . I will aim to do this Once a week to start with.

This is a great goal and I like that you are planning it once a week to start with. I note that your confidence is low at the moment are there any other ideas or strategies that could help you with this? Can you think of a treat that would help or a nice location for your walk? However it is also important not to pressure yourself and if finding a location is too much starting with nearby for example jut around to the block or walking for a set amount of time or steps may help? Amanda ☺
For the online cafe and being able to talk to people who didn't think I was crazy.
Emma thank you for this lovely feedback. It was such a lovely cafe yesterday sharing, chatting and lots of laughter. You are most definitely not crazy! Hope to see you again. Amanda ☺
Hi Emma, How did you get on with your goal? Please do update but also remember that it is ok to review and adjust your goal. Life and IIH can make you need to change plans? Amanda

I found this online and have been using it to explain to a whole load of people what I have found difficult to communicate before. They have said it is really useful because they didn't get it at all before and now they can at least understand a bit

I am going to set up a note book to help me keep a track of the research projects I have, but break them down into smaller bits. on I am going to set it up during this week.. I will aim to do this Hopefully as a kind of ongoing system?

I am so pleased you found this, and it has been useful. When I first read it, I felt like I was not alone anymore. It is a great idea to share it with others to help explain how you are, though I have shared it on my Facebook, you have inspired me to print it to show it to people in person too. 🙂

I'm intrigued. What are the research projects that you mentioned?  Please don't feel obliged to answer. I hope you find keeping a notebook helpful. Making it into a journal sounds like a great idea too. I shall look forward to finding out how you have got on next week 🙂

To be honest, your idea has inspired me, and I might incorporate it with my current studies too. 🙂

I started a new job yesterday. It's "only" a few hours on two days of the week but it's out, teaching students and is going to be something different on my CV for when I can eventually build back up to closer to full time again.
@emma223 massive congratulations! Manageable steps are important. Good luck.
My daughter, who does not like hugs, just came in and have me a hug.
I "finished" my goal, or rather started a continuous one... This is the only place I could think of to put a picture of my research notebook
Love this gratitude Amanda ☺

Wow there is a lot of work in here! Its great to have long term and short term goals. You can use the short term goals to work towards something in the long term. Make sure the goals are achievable though and set time frames for the individual steps. In this way you can have the satisfaction of achieving the goals along the way. Amanda ☺
I am going to pre-read for work this week. on I did some today and will finish tomorrow. . I will aim to do this Aiming for Fri and Sat pm
Emma this is great planning ahead. Your confidence is a bit low at 6 is there any thing else you could add to increase this? Amanda ☺
How are you getting on with your pre reading goal Emma?  Amanda
I have made it through the first week of my new job. Shattered, but no major "migraine" episode.
Emma Well done and enjoy the rest. Hope you are enjoying your new role. Amanda ☺
Churros. I was catching up on some admin that I should have done yesterday, except I was in bed. My husband made me churros and chocolate sauce 😁
Oh my days does he do delivery! That sounds delicious and how lovely of your husband. Amanda ☺

An odd gratitude, but I had a pretty sucky situation at work. Ironically it was my IIH that made me go, "Nope, not taking this - my needs are just as important." I sent it up the chain before I over thought, have a meeting tomorrow, then ate a doughnut (incidentally, yes Aldi's are not as good as Lidl 🤣). So I am grateful that I didn't break into pieces and stood up for myself.

@emma223 well done for sticking up for yourself. It is such a brave but important thing to do. Something, if I'm honest, I am not great at. I hope your meeting goes well tomorrow. It's useful to know about the doughnuts, thank you 🙂
Stickers. I know I am a "grown-up" but I like stickers to cheer up work- related stuff 😁
Love these! Amanda ☺
I want to publish my PhD as an actual book. IIH kind of stalled that process, but I have tried to start in up again.

I have starting parking a little bit further away when I go to work, meaning I have to work that little bit further each day too.  on Each time I get called in. . I will aim to do this It has been four days a week at the minute.
Emma I really hope that you are able to do this. Please take your time I know publishing and writing for publication can be quite time consuming. Keeping fingers crossed for you. Amanda ☺
Emma this is a great goal and and you are clearly thinking about ways to make small changes that fit in with your daily life. Enjoy the latte! Amanda ☺

priorFacilitatorReplies.text: Love these! Amanda ☺

@emma223 well done for sticking up for yourself. It is such a brave but important thing to do. Something, if I'm honest, I am not great at. I hope your meeting goes well tomorrow. It's useful to know about the doughnuts, thank you 🙂
Oh my days does he do delivery! That sounds delicious and how lovely of your husband. Amanda ☺
Emma Well done and enjoy the rest. Hope you are enjoying your new role. Amanda ☺

Wow there is a lot of work in here! Its great to have long term and short term goals. You can use the short term goals to work towards something in the long term. Make sure the goals are achievable though and set time frames for the individual steps. In this way you can have the satisfaction of achieving the goals along the way. Amanda ☺
Love this gratitude Amanda ☺
@emma223 massive congratulations! Manageable steps are important. Good luck.

I am so pleased you found this, and it has been useful. When I first read it, I felt like I was not alone anymore. It is a great idea to share it with others to help explain how you are, though I have shared it on my Facebook, you have inspired me to print it to show it to people in person too. 🙂
Emma thank you for this lovely feedback. It was such a lovely cafe yesterday sharing, chatting and lots of laughter. You are most definitely not crazy! Hope to see you again. Amanda ☺

It is great that you are able to prioritise your self-care, taking breaks when you need them. I like to have a stretch and a drink when I take a break, though sometimes it's simply resting. How do you like to take a break?
Emma this is a great goal and and you are clearly thinking about ways to make small changes that fit in with your daily life. Enjoy the latte! Amanda ☺
Emma this is great planning ahead. Your confidence is a bit low at 6 is there any thing else you could add to increase this? Amanda ☺
How are you getting on with your pre reading goal Emma?  Amanda

I'm intrigued. What are the research projects that you mentioned?  Please don't feel obliged to answer. I hope you find keeping a notebook helpful. Making it into a journal sounds like a great idea too. I shall look forward to finding out how you have got on next week 🙂

To be honest, your idea has inspired me, and I might incorporate it with my current studies too. 🙂

This is a great goal and I like that you are planning it once a week to start with. I note that your confidence is low at the moment are there any other ideas or strategies that could help you with this? Can you think of a treat that would help or a nice location for your walk? However it is also important not to pressure yourself and if finding a location is too much starting with nearby for example jut around to the block or walking for a set amount of time or steps may help? Amanda ☺
Hi Emma, How did you get on with your goal? Please do update but also remember that it is ok to review and adjust your goal. Life and IIH can make you need to change plans? Amanda
Emma I really hope that you are able to do this. Please take your time I know publishing and writing for publication can be quite time consuming. Keeping fingers crossed for you. Amanda ☺

participants.bio: Joined IIH-COH11-170925. No profile bio submitted yet.

events.description: I'm grateful to be able to rest this morning with a cup of tea. It eases the pressure I've been putting on myself just to enjoy the slow moments.
Bethanie treasuring the slow moments is so important. A cup of tea is one of my favourite treats Amanda ☺
Start a new book this week, even just a page. on Thursday after work on the sofa. I will aim to do this Once a week to begin with

A great goal. What type of books do you like to read? Have you a title already picked out? 

I'm looking forward to finding out how you got on next week 🙂

Ooh I love a Richard Osman, didn't realise he had a new one out that may be my treat for reading this week. I can see that you have found reading at the end of the day at the moment doesn't work but that you will be reading at lunchtime instead. Reviewing goals like this is really positive. Let us know how you get on Amanda
I'm going to make time sit and watch married at first sight when they air. on Each evening it's on.. I will aim to do this Monday to Thursday night
I confess to never having watched this but have friends who love it! I hope you enjoy it and I may have to try an episode too! Looking forward to hearing how you get on. Amanda ☺

How did you get on with your watching? Remember it is absolutely ok to reshedule your goal as IIH and life often get in the way. I had to reset my goal from last week due to poorly child and labrador. Amanda
Great feedback and glad you got to enjoy some unwind time!
I'm going to go into work one day this week on Anyday this week that I'm feeling good. I will aim to do this Just once this week
I want to do my masters degree

Bethanie this is a great goal but please don't put lots of pressure on yourself with a time limit. As you say seeing your colleagues face to face is important to you and I hope that this will be a positive experience. I love the reward what a great incentive. Amanda ☺

Wow a masters degree this is a great hope There are also lots more flexible ways to do post graduate study these days and more flexible timeframes than in the past. It is good that they recognise more that this is important but please do consider your needs alongside your choice of course and good luck. Amanda ☺
I'm grateful for my slow cooker! It's the first time I was able to prepare a proper meal for a few weeks and I wouldn't have been able to do it without my slow cooker!

@bethanie8 I am really pleased you managed to have a good meal using your slow cooker. I find ours so useful, though we haven't had a meal from ours for a while. You have inspired me to will get it out this week. 🙂
I'm going to say no to additional work this week on Wednesday at work. I will aim to do this This week, but will practice saying no more

I like this goal and totally get the challenge of not putting off your laptop and additional work. It is really important as you say not to pressure yourself and to also look after your work life balance especially with IIH. I look forward to seeing your halloween pens! Amanda☺

As promised, here is a picture of my current embroidery. I'm grateful that I'm still able to sew and for feeling more inspired lately! (Not my design and I'm sorry for the bad language on my needle minder 😂)
Bethanie this is a fabulous design no apologies needed for the language! Thank you for sharing your work ☺
Bethanie how did you get on with your goal? I hope that you have managed to get the pens! Amanda
@bethanie8 this is so lovely and well done on achieving your goal. It is great to hear that you are planning to go in to see colleagues again next week. The craft fair sounds lovely! Amanda

@bethanie8 well done on keeping your boundaries. 

Did you buy yourself the Halloween pens?

@bethanie8 well done on keeping your boundaries. 

Did you buy yourself the Halloween pens?
Complete some embroidery  on Probably tonight when my partner is at the gym. I will aim to do this Once a week
Bethanie your reward made me chuckle...brilliant! Amanda ☺

Bethanie8 how did you get on? Remember, setbacks are a normal part of life. Be kind to yourself if you didn't complete your goal.  I would have been tempted to buy myself a new embroidery kit even if I hadn't completed my goal lol

priorFacilitatorReplies.text: Bethanie this is a fabulous design no apologies needed for the language! Thank you for sharing your work ☺

@bethanie8 I am really pleased you managed to have a good meal using your slow cooker. I find ours so useful, though we haven't had a meal from ours for a while. You have inspired me to will get it out this week. 🙂
Bethanie treasuring the slow moments is so important. A cup of tea is one of my favourite treats Amanda ☺

@bethanie8 well done on keeping your boundaries. 

Did you buy yourself the Halloween pens?

@bethanie8 well done on keeping your boundaries. 

Did you buy yourself the Halloween pens?

@bethanie8 this is so lovely and well done on achieving your goal. It is great to hear that you are planning to go in to see colleagues again next week. The craft fair sounds lovely! Amanda
I confess to never having watched this but have friends who love it! I hope you enjoy it and I may have to try an episode too! Looking forward to hearing how you get on. Amanda ☺

How did you get on with your watching? Remember it is absolutely ok to reshedule your goal as IIH and life often get in the way. I had to reset my goal from last week due to poorly child and labrador. Amanda
Great feedback and glad you got to enjoy some unwind time!

Ooh I love a Richard Osman, didn't realise he had a new one out that may be my treat for reading this week. I can see that you have found reading at the end of the day at the moment doesn't work but that you will be reading at lunchtime instead. Reviewing goals like this is really positive. Let us know how you get on Amanda

A great goal. What type of books do you like to read? Have you a title already picked out? 

I'm looking forward to finding out how you got on next week 🙂

It is good that they recognise more that this is important but please do consider your needs alongside your choice of course and good luck. Amanda ☺

events.description: I’m grateful for the companionship of my dog Buddy. He keeps me motivated to get some exercise each day. ❤️
@ruth39 Buddy is gorgeous. Our furry family members really do make days brighter. It's great that walking Buddy helps you to get some exercise.
Create some photosensitive artwork  on In the kitchen and garden. Over the next week.. I will aim to do this Once
@ruth40 I am intrigued. What is photosensitive artwork? I look forward to finding out how you got on. If you feel confident enough, it would be great if you could share something you created. 🙂
Wow these are amazing! Sorry to hear the paint is not the one you wanted but I think they look fabulous and I love the idea of this. Amanda
To meet up with my friend for a catch up. on Next week, in a cafe or at one of our houses.. I will aim to do this Monthly
Ruth this is a lovely goal and I look forward to hearing how it goes. Time with friends is so important and enjoy the cake! Amanda ☺
I’m grateful to my daughter and husband who drive me to my pottery course. Without them I would of had to stop after suddenly having to stop driving.
To finish planting my spring bulbs  on Next Tuesday in the front and back garden.. I will aim to do this Hopefully it will take just one day to finish

@ruth40 such a lovely gratitude. I am really pleased you are still able to go to your pottery class. Is it something you have been doing for a while? I would love to see one of your makes, if you are happy to share 🙂
@ruth40 such a lovely goal, to plant and grow spring flowers, but with the added bonus of knowing they can be used at your daughter's wedding. Congratulations to your daughter and partner.
I will finish glazing my fairy houses and fairy doors and fire them. on At the kitchen table. . I will aim to do this 3 days a week
@ruth40 those fairy houses look amazing! I shall look forward to seeing them completed. 🙂I have a major weak spot for fairies and related fairy things.
@ruth40, well done on completing your goal. I really hope they do well for you, and can be used at your daughter's wedding

@ruth40 did you manage to glaze and fire the fairy houses and doors? If not, don't worry, life happens, with Hope we like to take a compassionate approach, be kind to yourself. You can update your goal if you need more time, simply by pressing the 3 little dots in the top right corner.

priorFacilitatorReplies.text: @ruth40 such a lovely gratitude. I am really pleased you are still able to go to your pottery class. Is it something you have been doing for a while? I would love to see one of your makes, if you are happy to share 🙂

@ruth40 those fairy houses look amazing! I shall look forward to seeing them completed. 🙂I have a major weak spot for fairies and related fairy things.
@ruth40, well done on completing your goal. I really hope they do well for you, and can be used at your daughter's wedding
@ruth40 such a lovely goal, to plant and grow spring flowers, but with the added bonus of knowing they can be used at your daughter's wedding. Congratulations to your daughter and partner.
Ruth this is a lovely goal and I look forward to hearing how it goes. Time with friends is so important and enjoy the cake! Amanda ☺
Wow these are amazing! Sorry to hear the paint is not the one you wanted but I think they look fabulous and I love the idea of this. Amanda
@ruth40 I am intrigued. What is photosensitive artwork? I look forward to finding out how you got on. If you feel confident enough, it would be great if you could share something you created. 🙂

participants.bio: Joined IIH-COH11-170925. No profile bio submitted yet.

events.description: I'm grateful for feeling well enough to visit my aunt and uncle yesterday and meeting their adorable new puppy Mac!!
Oh my gosh he is adorable and very happy you got to meet him! I am loving seeing everyone's dog photos (all other pet photos welcomed!). Amanda ☺

To complete some of the Hope programme every other day - I will aim to do this for at least 30 minutes each time. on I will aim for every other day.. I will aim to do this Will do this for 30 minutes every other day.

This is a lovely goal, I will look forward to finding out how you got on next week 🙂. I notice your confidence level is a 5. Is there some way you could alter this goal to make it feel more achievable? Perhaps doing the course in smaller chunks or on fewer days?
Donna how are you getting on with your goal of working on the HOPE programme? Amanda

Donna please don't be frustrated things do get in the way and amending or changing goals is absolutely fine. I am sorry that birthday celebrations increased your symptoms and hope this week will be more settled for you. Amanda

Bit late putting it on here but I'm grateful for the support of a good friend! 
At the weekend a friend of mine travelled 2 hours from where I used to live to see me! She was very supportive and understanding, and was happy to do whatever I could manage as my symptoms weren't great over the weekend. Was lovely to see her as it had been over 2 years since we last saw each other.
@donna62 a gratitude like this is never too late! I am pleased your friend is being so supportive. I hope you manage to meet up again sooner than 2 years. 🙂
To go for a walk  on Local park - will aim for Tuesdays and Thursdays. . I will aim to do this I will aim for twice a week
I want to finish the Advanced Diploma I was doing before my IIH symptoms started!

priorFacilitatorReplies.text: @donna62 a gratitude like this is never too late! I am pleased your friend is being so supportive. I hope you manage to meet up again sooner than 2 years. 🙂
Oh my gosh he is adorable and very happy you got to meet him! I am loving seeing everyone's dog photos (all other pet photos welcomed!). Amanda ☺
Donna how are you getting on with your goal of working on the HOPE programme? Amanda

Donna please don't be frustrated things do get in the way and amending or changing goals is absolutely fine. I am sorry that birthday celebrations increased your symptoms and hope this week will be more settled for you. Amanda

This is a lovely goal, I will look forward to finding out how you got on next week 🙂. I notice your confidence level is a 5. Is there some way you could alter this goal to make it feel more achievable? Perhaps doing the course in smaller chunks or on fewer days?

events.description: Hi Sheila this is a lovely gratitude enjoy your holiday!😊
Such a gorgeous picture. Sight is so precious, a really good thing to be grateful for 😊
A fabulous picture and great to hear that he puts a smile on your face. My labradors do the same for me Amanda 😊
Oh wow Sheila fabulous picture and yes I can imagine feeling the wind in your face will be wonderful. It is great weather at the moment long may that continue! 😊
@sheila15, such precious moments. It's lovely that the Robin keeps returning.
Sheila Well done for completing your goal how was the ride and did you enjoy the feel of the wind in your hair? Amanda

Sheila thank you for sharing your hope. Planning to see family would be lovely and I really hope that you get to go to canada. I love the picture with the Adirondack chairs these make me think of the USA and Canada too 😊
To fly to Canada to see my great nephew  on Sunday . I will aim to do this Just once
Been able to see my great nephew in canada
To go for a swim on Monday morning . I will aim to do this Just once
Oh wow! Canada is amazing and I hope that there are no issues with your flight. Have an amazing time and we will look forward to hearing about your trip and cuddle your great nephew! Amanda ☺
Wow have an amazing trip! Amanda ☺
I hope you are having a lovely swim today and that the water is not too cold! We look forward to hearing how you get on. Amanda ☺
@sheila19 I'm not certain if you are still in Canada. When you return, we would love to know how you got on. I really hope you arrived safely and met your great-nephew. Such a beautiful goal.
@Sheila19 well done on completing your goal. A lovely photo, you look radiant. I admit I would like to go swimming more. I will make it one of my goals for next week.
To keep sewing  on When I get home next week . I will aim to do this Every week

Hi Sheila, Sewing is a great goal. You might want to think about how you can make your goal more achievable by setting how many often you will do it, at what time or for a set amount of time? sometimes open goals mean that its more challenging to measure when you have achieved them. If you are unsure then maybe start with once or twice a week without setting the specific day for example? Best wishes Amanda
Wow fabulous picture. Have a wonderful time. Enjoy the cuddles. Amanda

priorFacilitatorReplies.text: Wow have an amazing trip! Amanda ☺
@sheila15, such precious moments. It's lovely that the Robin keeps returning.
A fabulous picture and great to hear that he puts a smile on your face. My labradors do the same for me Amanda 😊
Such a gorgeous picture. Sight is so precious, a really good thing to be grateful for 😊
Hi Sheila this is a lovely gratitude enjoy your holiday!😊

Hi Sheila, Sewing is a great goal. You might want to think about how you can make your goal more achievable by setting how many often you will do it, at what time or for a set amount of time? sometimes open goals mean that its more challenging to measure when you have achieved them. If you are unsure then maybe start with once or twice a week without setting the specific day for example? Best wishes Amanda
I hope you are having a lovely swim today and that the water is not too cold! We look forward to hearing how you get on. Amanda ☺
@Sheila19 well done on completing your goal. A lovely photo, you look radiant. I admit I would like to go swimming more. I will make it one of my goals for next week.
Oh wow! Canada is amazing and I hope that there are no issues with your flight. Have an amazing time and we will look forward to hearing about your trip and cuddle your great nephew! Amanda ☺
Wow fabulous picture. Have a wonderful time. Enjoy the cuddles. Amanda
@sheila19 I'm not certain if you are still in Canada. When you return, we would love to know how you got on. I really hope you arrived safely and met your great-nephew. Such a beautiful goal.
Oh wow Sheila fabulous picture and yes I can imagine feeling the wind in your face will be wonderful. It is great weather at the moment long may that continue! 😊
Sheila Well done for completing your goal how was the ride and did you enjoy the feel of the wind in your hair? Amanda

Sheila thank you for sharing your hope. Planning to see family would be lovely and I really hope that you get to go to canada. I love the picture with the Adirondack chairs these make me think of the USA and Canada too 😊

participants.bio: Joined IIH-COH11-170925. No profile bio submitted yet.

events.description: @joanna40  a lovely goal to nurture and grow from seed.  Remembering why it's important to you might just give your confidence an extra boost.   And, I wonder if your photo to your daughter might encourage her to do the same with you?  P.S. Lovely photo of your garden.
So lovely 💞thank you for sharing
@joanna40 well done on completing your goal, enjoy your pumpkins and strawberries when they are ready in a few months. I hope the older lady is OK, I am pleased you were there to help her.
@joanna40 I love the photo! I'm really looking forward to seeing the progress you make on the jumper and eventually it complete 😊
Aww beautiful fur babies!

@joanna40 I really love this goal. I'm looking forward to finding out how you get on 😊 I notice your confidence of completing this goal is only 4. Be kind to yourself setting a smaller goal is often more achievable. Perhaps aiming to do this exercise on less days, or setting a reminder on your phone to do it would be helpful? It's easy to amend your goal, simply click the three little dots.
@joanna40 it's so good that you have a supportive partner, a really lovely gratitude. 😊
@joanna40, it's fine to postpone a goal, setbacks, including positive ones like nice weather happen. I hope you managed to get outside to enjoy the nice weather at some point this week.

Joanna absolutely setting goals that are smarter takes time and practice. It is great that you have reflected on this goal and and are making a new one that is more achievable. Looking forward to hearing how you get on. Amanda
@joanna40, what plant is this beginning to shoot up?
@joanna40 two beautiful fury friends what are their names? I'm looking forward to finding out how you get on with your goal, fingers crossed the weather is kind enough so you can get outside 😊
What a fabulous picture Joanna. I look forward to hearing how you get on with your painting or reading. Time to yourself is so important. Amanda 😊
A massive well done for completing the jumper, I'm looking forward to seeing Beth wearing it. Remember, life happens; it's perfectly OK to take longer doing something than we expected.
@joanna40 I am so pleased you managed to get outside on one day. I'm also thrilled that you managed to continue your reading inside. Your book looks really interesting. What genre is it?
Joanna I love this picture and what a fabulous jumper! I love that you are so proud of her what a fabulous gratitude 😊
Joanna what a lovely goal. Painting can be so relaxing and surprising her with a gift is a lovely idea. Looking forward to seeing the finished glass jar 😊
A mustang wish it was my car too! What music would you have? I am hearing Tom Petty Learning to Fly looking at this car? 😊

Joanne just wondering how you got on with your glass jar? It would be lovely to see a picture but please remember that it is ok to postpone, change, cancel a goal sometimes life gets in the way.  Be kind to yourself Amanda
To walk most days with my dogs on Most days along the river. I will aim to do this Four times a week
My Granddaughter Elsie, for making us love and laugh and enjoy her magical world

@joanna51 such gorgeous dogs, the picture of them melts my heart. Walking them is such a great goal and I love the reward you chose. 

I will look forward to finding out how you got on next week.
@joanna51 such a gorgeous picture of Elsie, I understand how much she will brighten your life. Such a precious gratitude.

I’m grateful for my boys (dogs) and also my Tristan for looking after me yesterday when I felt so horribly poorly, I had a crushing headache all day, came out of the blue but they all supported me with cuddles and love.

So sorry to hear that your head was really bad and hope it is feeling better today. I love the jumpers your dogs are wearing just looking at them made me smile and I hope their cuddles helped. Amanda ☺

Joanna this is great as life does get in the way especially with a condition like IIH. What is really lovely that you have recognised your success with this goal on the days that you were able to walk. Resetting or reframing goals is absolutely the right thing to do. Amanda
To complete a craft project  on In the afternoon at home. I will aim to do this Depends how long it takes

You are absolutely right that crafting can bring peace and enjoyment. What will you do? I am quite craft challenged especially anything that involves sewing! Look forward to seeing what you make. I note that your confidence is under 7 is there anything that could help you improve it? Amanda ☺
Wow thats an amazing amount of knitting how fabulous. In my eyes you have over achieved your goal well done. Amanda
To clear my greenhouse ready for winter and my small vegetable patch  on This afternoon in the garden. I will aim to do this When needed

Wow fabulous vegetable patch. You clearly have green fingers I am very jealous...I have been known to kill mint which I am told is impossible but I have managed it twice.....I look forward to hearing how you get on! Amanda ☺
Emma how did you get on with your gardening goal? Remember it is absolutely ok to modify or amend your goal, life and IIH can get in the way. Amanda
@joanna52 a massive well done on completing your goal. Those pumpkins look amazing, enjoy your pumpkin soup when you have made it x

priorFacilitatorReplies.text: So sorry to hear that your head was really bad and hope it is feeling better today. I love the jumpers your dogs are wearing just looking at them made me smile and I hope their cuddles helped. Amanda ☺
@joanna51 such a gorgeous picture of Elsie, I understand how much she will brighten your life. Such a precious gratitude.
Joanna I love this picture and what a fabulous jumper! I love that you are so proud of her what a fabulous gratitude 😊
@joanna40, what plant is this beginning to shoot up?
@joanna40 it's so good that you have a supportive partner, a really lovely gratitude. 😊
Aww beautiful fur babies!
So lovely 💞thank you for sharing

Wow fabulous vegetable patch. You clearly have green fingers I am very jealous...I have been known to kill mint which I am told is impossible but I have managed it twice.....I look forward to hearing how you get on! Amanda ☺
Emma how did you get on with your gardening goal? Remember it is absolutely ok to modify or amend your goal, life and IIH can get in the way. Amanda
@joanna52 a massive well done on completing your goal. Those pumpkins look amazing, enjoy your pumpkin soup when you have made it x

You are absolutely right that crafting can bring peace and enjoyment. What will you do? I am quite craft challenged especially anything that involves sewing! Look forward to seeing what you make. I note that your confidence is under 7 is there anything that could help you improve it? Amanda ☺
Wow thats an amazing amount of knitting how fabulous. In my eyes you have over achieved your goal well done. Amanda

Joanna this is great as life does get in the way especially with a condition like IIH. What is really lovely that you have recognised your success with this goal on the days that you were able to walk. Resetting or reframing goals is absolutely the right thing to do. Amanda

@joanna51 such gorgeous dogs, the picture of them melts my heart. Walking them is such a great goal and I love the reward you chose. 

I will look forward to finding out how you got on next week.
Joanna what a lovely goal. Painting can be so relaxing and surprising her with a gift is a lovely idea. Looking forward to seeing the finished glass jar 😊

Joanne just wondering how you got on with your glass jar? It would be lovely to see a picture but please remember that it is ok to postpone, change, cancel a goal sometimes life gets in the way.  Be kind to yourself Amanda
What a fabulous picture Joanna. I look forward to hearing how you get on with your painting or reading. Time to yourself is so important. Amanda 😊
@joanna40 I am so pleased you managed to get outside on one day. I'm also thrilled that you managed to continue your reading inside. Your book looks really interesting. What genre is it?
@joanna40 two beautiful fury friends what are their names? I'm looking forward to finding out how you get on with your goal, fingers crossed the weather is kind enough so you can get outside 😊

Joanna absolutely setting goals that are smarter takes time and practice. It is great that you have reflected on this goal and and are making a new one that is more achievable. Looking forward to hearing how you get on. Amanda

@joanna40 I really love this goal. I'm looking forward to finding out how you get on 😊 I notice your confidence of completing this goal is only 4. Be kind to yourself setting a smaller goal is often more achievable. Perhaps aiming to do this exercise on less days, or setting a reminder on your phone to do it would be helpful? It's easy to amend your goal, simply click the three little dots.
@joanna40 I love the photo! I'm really looking forward to seeing the progress you make on the jumper and eventually it complete 😊
A massive well done for completing the jumper, I'm looking forward to seeing Beth wearing it. Remember, life happens; it's perfectly OK to take longer doing something than we expected.
@joanna40, it's fine to postpone a goal, setbacks, including positive ones like nice weather happen. I hope you managed to get outside to enjoy the nice weather at some point this week.
@joanna40 well done on completing your goal, enjoy your pumpkins and strawberries when they are ready in a few months. I hope the older lady is OK, I am pleased you were there to help her.

@joanna40  a lovely goal to nurture and grow from seed.  Remembering why it's important to you might just give your confidence an extra boost.   And, I wonder if your photo to your daughter might encourage her to do the same with you?  P.S. Lovely photo of your garden.
A mustang wish it was my car too! What music would you have? I am hearing Tom Petty Learning to Fly looking at this car? 😊

participants.bio: Walking, reading, watching movies

events.description: Pure love
Pure love
Finish the book about self reflection on At home every day either when I wake up or at 11. I will aim to do this Daily
@tunde2 aww such gorgeous dogs. What are their names?
@tunde2 I honestly thought I had replied, so apologies if this is a duplicate lol. Such gorgeous dogs. 🙂 I can imagine how much pleasure you gain from them
This is a lovely goal. What book are you following? I look forward to finding out how you get on next week 🙂

@tunde2 How did you get on? Remember to be kind with yourself if you didn't achieve it. Setbacks are a natural part of life. You can always amend or pause your goal if you need or want to. Just press the three little dots at the top right-hand corner of your goal.
My partner to work so hard so I can rest
My partner to work so hard so I can rest
This sounds like your partner has given you time and space to rest. Amands

participants.bio: Recently diagnosed with iih very scary and hard to deal with I feel a completely different person like my personality has changed just want to feel like me again and not be so anxious all the time

events.description: Taking dogs out every day on Daily local to me . I will aim to do this Once day
Being alive
Sorting my under the stairs out  on Saturday /sunday . I will aim to do this Until it’s complete

@jodymatt Such a lovely goal. What type of dogs are they? Have you got a specific way in mind to relax as a reward? It could be something as simple as siting quietly with a cuppa for 5 10 mins?

I'm looking forward to finding out how you got on, next week
Such a lovely gratitude. I too am thankful for waking every morning and being alive. Though in this moment I am especially grateful for the cuppa my husband just handed me lol.
@jodymatt such a worthwhile goal. When are ou moving home? I know how much of an upheaval it can be. I like your reward, have you any idea what film you will watch?
@jody3 the girlfriend does sound really good. I haven't watched it, but I am tempted to.
I am so sorry; it is really hard to lose a furry family member. We had a springer spaniel lab cross. I know how much joy and comfort dogs can bring.

@jody3, it would be lovely if you could update your goal, regardless of whether you completed it or not. If you are anything like me, you have simply forgotten to update it or haven't had the opportunity to.
Just about to update mine too! Amanda
Have a nice long bath and meditate  on Next sun . I will aim to do this Once a week
A long soak and meditation are great goals. Do you practice any particular type of meditation? I usually do a bit of self-led, but recently I've been following recordings as I'm doing a course.

Are you finding the course helpful? @jody3 
I definitely find the one I'm doing helpful, so long as I ensure to do the practices.

@jody3 did you manage to complete your goal? Perhaps you just haven't had opportunity to update it here. If you didn't complete it you can always update your goal by pressing the three little dots in the top right corner 😊

@jody3 the girlfriend does sound really good. I haven't watched it, but I am tempted to.

Just about to update mine too! Amanda

participants.bio: Joined IIH-COH11-170925. No profile bio submitted yet.

events.description: I am grateful for my partner, who is extremely supportive and understanding, especially on my worst days
@hannah69 it is great that your partner is supportive and that you recognise this with gratitute, I must admit I often take my husband for granted lol
To complete one session of yoga a week on I will do this at home on Friday mornings. I will aim to do this Once a week to begin with, hopefully increasing

Hannah I love Yoga too but have to be careful head down. I really like how you have been realistic with once a week and planned when you will do this in your week. I look forward to hearing how you get on. Amanda
Hi Hannah, How did you get on with your goal? Please do update but also remember that it is ok to review and adjust your goal. Life and IIH can make you need to change plans? Amanda
Start to read again on In bed, at home. I will aim to do this Every night to create the habit again

Hannah reading is a lovely goal and totally agree the perils of scrolling on the phone. I think I need a timed lock box or someone to remove mine from me! Have a think about making the goal achievable for you sometimes doing something every day can be hard you might want to start at a couple of times a week for example? It might also be useful to use a timer or set yourself a number of chapters or pages so that you can feel you are achieving? Sometimes even picking a book to read is a goal for me! Amanda ☺
Plan to go out and do something fun with my partner and daughter on At the weekend, somewhere Autumnal and Halloweeny. I will aim to do this At least twice a month to begin with
Such a lovely goal. Have you any idea where you might visit? 🙂
Hannah how did you get on with your reading goal? Remember it is absolutely ok to need to modify your goals as life and IIH can get in the way. Amanda

priorFacilitatorReplies.text: @hannah69 it is great that your partner is supportive and that you recognise this with gratitute, I must admit I often take my husband for granted lol
Such a lovely goal. Have you any idea where you might visit? 🙂

Hannah reading is a lovely goal and totally agree the perils of scrolling on the phone. I think I need a timed lock box or someone to remove mine from me! Have a think about making the goal achievable for you sometimes doing something every day can be hard you might want to start at a couple of times a week for example? It might also be useful to use a timer or set yourself a number of chapters or pages so that you can feel you are achieving? Sometimes even picking a book to read is a goal for me! Amanda ☺
Hannah how did you get on with your reading goal? Remember it is absolutely ok to need to modify your goals as life and IIH can get in the way. Amanda

Hannah I love Yoga too but have to be careful head down. I really like how you have been realistic with once a week and planned when you will do this in your week. I look forward to hearing how you get on. Amanda
Hi Hannah, How did you get on with your goal? Please do update but also remember that it is ok to review and adjust your goal. Life and IIH can make you need to change plans? Amanda

events.description: I had a useful CBT session today.
Helen this is good to hear and I am glad that you are finding CBT useful. Thank you for sharing. Amanda ☺

Write and publish a short story.
Keep healthy and get fitter.
Eat 1 portions of fruit a day.  on Every morning . I will aim to do this Every morning
Helen what a lovely HOPE this is and I wish you the best of luck with it. Amanda ☺

Helen this is a lovely goal and I am sorry to hear that you have a number of conditions impacted by diet. Make sure you pick fruits that you enjoy and as you say have it available to make it easily accessible for you. Amanda ☺

@Helen41 how did you get on? Perhaps you just haven't had a chance to update your goal yet. Even if you managed to eat fruit on fewer days than you planned, it's a great achievement. If you didn't manage to eat fruit on any morning, that is totally OK be kind to yourself; setbacks are normal.

events.description: I am grateful for my partner who supports me no matter how I am feeling, and is always the thing I am most grateful for everyday.
I will read a section of my book four times a week before bed. on In the evening, in bed. . I will aim to do this Four times a week (aiming to focus on week days).
What a fabulous gratitude support from partners, family and friends is invaluable. Amanda ☺
This is a lovely goal. I hope its a good book and look forward to hearing how you get on. Very good point not to charge phoen by bed they are far too tempting to look at. Amanda ☺
I am grateful for my colleagues being understanding of my needs and for choosing to look after myself rather than pushing through work.
It is great that you have supportive colleagues, and also you recognise the need to look after yourself. 🙂 Have you any tips for others about how to chat at work about the challenges IIH brings?

events.description: I'm grateful that my dad helped move the sofa so I could hoover behind. I enjoy making sure everywhere is super clean. I also went to the hospital this morning for an unrelated IIH issue and the specialist was really nice, understanding and comforting so that made me feel really good.
I am going to go for a walk or swim 4 times a week  on Swimming at the gym or walking at a park. I will aim to do this 4 times a week
I'm going to start a new series  on At home on the sofa. I will aim to do this Evenings whenever I have time
It's great that your Dad helped. I am really pleased you had a good experience with the consultant; it makes such a big difference, doesn't it? 🙂
@olivia24 a ninja blender, sounds like such an amazing reward. 🙂 I wish you well with your activity goal and look forward to finding out how you got on next week. 🙂
@olivia24 it's great you have another goal, just remember to take care of yourself. Though watching a new series sounds like you really are, have you any idea what you would like to watch?
@olivia24 how did you get on with your goal? Remember it is ok to reset or change a goal as life and IIH do get in the way. Amanda

I’m grateful for my cosy home.

A home is something we often take for granted; it really is something to be grateful for. What is it that makes it especially cosy for you?
Hope how did you get on with your walking goal? I hope you got to enjoy a lovely bubble bath? Amanda

events.description: To take my meds regularly  on At breakfast and dinner. I’ll carry the pill caddy. I will aim to do this Twice a day.

Hi Zoe, it can be really hard to remember to take medication. I note that your confidence is low and wonder if there is anything else you can do to support you with this? I have a post it note by my bed on the lamp to remind me to take bedtime meds, I like the note next to kettle idea! Alarms are a great idea. A new lipstick as a treat is a fabulous idea. I look forward to hearing how you get on. Amanda ☺
Zoe how did you get on with your goal. Remember it is ok to reset or amend a goal. Amanda

Reading

events.description: It's very easy to take the being able to do things for granted.  Lovely gratitude.

This is a great goal @hayleigh2! I can see that  your confidence score is a little on the low side. Studies have shown we are more likely to achieve our goals if we have a confidence score of  7 or above -  is there anything you can think of that would increase this slightly? Looking forward to hearing how you get on!
How did you get on with this one @hayleigh2? Remember it’s ok if you need to extend this goal!
